/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_ngap.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/ngap_asn1_packer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/ngap_asn1_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/log_helpers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/ngap_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/ngap_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/ngap_connection_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/ngap_validators/ngap_validators.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/gateways/n2_connection_client_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/metrics/ngap_metrics_aggregator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ng_setup_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ng_reset_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_dl_nas_message_transfer_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_dl_ran_status_transfer_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_handover_preparation_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_handover_resource_allocation_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_initial_context_setup_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_path_switch_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_pdu_session_resource_modify_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_pdu_session_resource_release_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_pdu_session_resource_setup_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_ue_context_modification_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_ngap.dir/procedures/ngap_ue_context_release_procedure.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_ngap.a
